title: hypericum perforatum var. veronense
intro: Hypericum perforatum var. veronense, also known as the St. John's Wort, is a perennial flowering plant native to Europe. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its high concentration of hypericin and hyperforin, which have anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antidepressant effects. The health benefits of St. John's Wort include the potential treatment of mild to moderate depression, anxiety, and sleep disorders, as well as its use in wound healing and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of St. John's Wort include teas, tinctures, capsules, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
